title: School Configuration
description: School settings including time grid and periods configuration

start_time.description: School start time in HH:MM format

end_time.description: School end time in HH:MM format

periods_per_weekday.description: Number of periods per regular weekday

period_duration_minutes.description: Duration of each period in minutes

lunch_period_index.description: Period number AFTER which lunch break occurs (e.g., 4 means lunch is AFTER Period 4, before Period 5). This is NOT a period itself - it's a break between periods.

lunch_after_period.description: Alternative name for lunch_period_index. Period number AFTER which lunch break occurs. Use either this or lunch_period_index.

lunch_duration_minutes.description: Duration of lunch break in minutes

recess_period_indices.description: Period numbers AFTER which recess occurs. Example: [2] means recess after Period 2.

recess_after_every_n_periods.description: Automatic recess placement: insert recess after every N periods (excluding lunch). Example: 3 means recess after P3, P6, etc.
